title: Effort Reporting Policy
content: Governs the certification of personnel effort devoted to sponsored projects, ensuring that salary charges to federal and non-federal awards reasonably reflect the work performed. Establishes the requirement for after-the-fact effort confirmation by individuals with suitable means of verification, consistent with 2 CFR 200.430. Compiled in PI Handbook 5 (effective 2024-07-01). Full policy details in PI Handbook 5.
